title: Chicken Bliss Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender chicken, vegetables, and a hint of Mediterranean spices. Serve with a side of crusty bread for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: mediterranean bliss spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most spice stores or online

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breasts and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the Mediterranean bliss spice blend, chicken stock, carrots, and potatoes.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
